scripts.dev: concurrently --names "server,worker,client" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:worker" "bun run dev:client"
scripts.dev:server: cd s2s.server && uv run --env-file .env uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.dev:worker: cd s2s.server && uv run --env-file .env python3 livekit_chain.py dev
